case_title: ISENHUT, SUZANNE M vs. GURWITZ, MICHAEL C

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISENHUT, SUZANNE M AS TO DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF JUL-28-1992, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT
LAW AND MOTION, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1992 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISENHUT, SUZANNE M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C $6,217.92 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,217.92
ORDER RE; ENTRY OF JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISENHUT, SUZANNE M HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-1992 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECIEPT TO MICHAEL GURWITZ 7/28/92 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISENHUT, SUZANNE M
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1992, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER
COPY OF NUNC PRO TUNC ORDER AND JUDGMENT MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
